ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence */,
  "sequence_data" TEXT /* Actual sequence data */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of sequence (e.g., RNA, DNA, protein) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "sequence_description" TEXT /* Description or functional annotation of the sequence */,
  "taxonomy" TEXT /* Taxonomy information (e.g., species, kingdom, phylum) */,
  "assembly" TEXT /* Assembly or build information (e.g., genome assembly, chromosome number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_levels" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression level */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being expressed */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Value of the expression level */,
  "expression_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the expression level (e.g., TPM, FPKM) */,
  "p_value" REAL /* Statistical significance or p-value of the expression level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_levels_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., tissue, cell line) */,
  "sample_source" TEXT /* Source of the sample (e.g., patient, donor) */,
  "disease_state" TEXT /* Disease state or condition of the sample */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Tissue type or organ of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_samples" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the sequence and sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id", "sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description or functional annotation of the gene */,
  "ontology" TEXT /* Ontology information (e.g., GO term, KEGG pathway) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_genes" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the sequence and gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id", "gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation or institution of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions or access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., GO term, Pfam domain) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or reference of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_annotations_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., GO term, Pfam domain) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or reference of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., disease state, tissue type) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or reference of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_annotations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., public database, publication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_data_sources" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the sequence and data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id", "source_id")
)
